what_clearly_came_before: The earlier instructional chain beginning with القيام والقراءة والركوع والاعتدال
why_mid_instruction_matters: The visible fragment begins after the sequence has already started, so the owner is dropped into the middle of a process.
local_clarity_vs_missing_scope: Readable wording, missing placement inside the full instruction.

trigger_text: ثم اسجد حتى تطمئن ساجداً، ثم ارفع من السجود واجلس حتى تطمئن جالساً
what_clearly_came_before: Earlier actions that make this a continuation rather than a standalone prayer description
why_mid_instruction_matters: The prayer actions make sense only as later members of a larger sequence.
local_clarity_vs_missing_scope: Local postures are clear; instructional sequence is not self-contained.

trigger_text: وافعل هذه الأفعال والأقوال في صلاتك كلها
what_clearly_came_before: A broader set of previously named actions and sayings in the hadith instruction
why_mid_instruction_matters: This phrase explicitly reaches backward and therefore exposes the hidden omission.
local_clarity_vs_missing_scope: The sentence is readable while its scope is not.

trigger_text: ماعدا تكبيرة الإحرام، فإنها في الركعة الأولى دون غيرها من الركعات
what_clearly_came_before: تكبيرة الإحرام and the earlier full prayer-instruction set
why_mid_instruction_matters: The exception is only safe when the larger governed set is visible or recovered.
